title: Campus Problem Hub
description: A platform where students submit campus problems and colleges track and resolve them using AI moderation. Features intelligent categorization and priority scoring.

title: AI Agent Builder
description: A drag-and-drop interface to build custom AI agents using LLMs. Supports tool calling, memory, and multi-step reasoning with a visual workflow editor.

title: Althon Hackathon Platform
description: Full platform for managing hackathon registrations, team formation, project submissions, and judging for the Althon 26 hackathon event.
